tagline: Your One-Stop Solution for Premium Weekly Pool Service, Repairs, and Equipment in Tucson

hero.headline: 43 Years of Crystal Clear Pools
hero.subheadline: Tucson families have trusted Splash Pool Service since 1983. We include all chemicals, offer free evaluations, and back every service with a money-back guarantee.
checkmarks: All chemicals included - no hidden charges
Free Pool School training with every new service

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to major repairs, Splash handles everything so you can just enjoy your pool.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Three-tier maintenance plans with chemical balancing, system inspection, filter cleaning, and complete pool and spa care. All chemicals included in your monthly price.

cards.title: Pool Repairs
cards.description: Expert repair for pumps, filters, heaters, lights, plumbing, and automation systems. Every job starts with a free evaluation before any paid work begins.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Pool turned green? Our professional drain and cleanup service restores your pool to crystal clear condition quickly and affordably.

cards.title: Pool Tile Cleaning
cards.description: We remove stubborn mineral deposits and calcium buildup from your pool tiles, restoring their original shine and beauty.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Upgrade to smart pool controls, variable speed pumps, energy-efficient heaters, and other modern equipment installed by our licensed technicians.

cards.title: Pool Draining & Acid Wash
cards.description: Complete pool draining recommended every 3-5 years, combined with acid wash treatment to refresh and revitalize your pool surfaces.

steps.title: Free Evaluation
steps.description: We visit your pool at no cost, assess its condition, and recommend the right service plan for your needs.

steps.title: Choose Your Plan
steps.description: Pick from three maintenance tiers or schedule a one-time service. All chemicals are included with no surprise charges.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Relax while our experienced team keeps your pool sparkling. Plus, we'll teach you the basics with our free Pool School training.

about.label: About Splash Pool Service
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1983. Trusted by Tucson.
about.description: For over four decades, Splash Pool Service has been the name Tucson pool owners rely on. As a licensed, bonded, and insured family business, we treat every pool like it's our own. Our money-back guarantee means you never risk a penny, and our free evaluations ensure you only pay for what you actually need.

features.title: Money-Back Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied with our service? We'll refund your last month's payment. No questions asked, no hoops to jump through.

features.title: Free Evaluations First
features.description: We never charge for evaluations. We assess your pool, explain what's needed, and you decide before any paid work begins.

features.title: All Chemicals Included
features.description: Your monthly price covers every chemical your pool needs. No surprise charges, no nickel-and-diming, no hidden fees ever.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing, Zero Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes all chemicals, regular inspections, and our satisfaction guarantee. No contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our Money-Back Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely happy with our service, we'll refund your last month's payment. No questions asked. That's how confident we are in our team's work. We've stood behind this promise since 1983 because we believe you deserve a pool service that earns your trust every single week.

faqs.question: What's included in the monthly service price?
faqs.answer: All chemicals needed to keep your pool balanced and clean are included in your monthly price. There are no hidden charges or surprise fees for chemicals, test kits, or standard maintenance supplies.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No. We earn your business every month. If you're ever unhappy, our money-back guarantee means we'll refund your last month's payment with no questions asked.

faqs.question: What is Pool School?
faqs.answer: Pool School is our free training session included with every new service startup. We teach you pool care basics so you understand what we do and can spot issues between visits. It's our way of empowering you as a pool owner.

faqs.question: How quickly can you clean a green pool?
faqs.answer: Most green pools are restored to crystal clear condition within one to two weeks, depending on severity. We start with a free evaluation to assess the situation and provide an honest timeline.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Splash Pool Service is fully licensed (ROC #327706), bonded, and insured. We've maintained these credentials continuously since 1983, giving you complete peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Terri
testimonials.text: Will never use another pool company. My pool is always crystal clear.

testimonials.name: Kate DeMeester
testimonials.text: Highly recommend Splash Pools! Nick took our pool from cloudy and dark green to crystal clear in less than two weeks.

testimonials.name: Stan
testimonials.text: Pool service is consistent and very helpful. Been with them since 2008.

contact.headline: Ready for a Cleaner Pool?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free evaluation today. No pressure, no obligation - just honest advice from Tucson's most trusted pool team.

footer.description: Splash Pool Service has proudly served Tucson pool owners since 1983. Licensed, bonded, and insured - we stand behind every service with our money-back guarantee.
